name: HR administrators in small to medium-sized businesses using Gusto for employee benefits management tool
description: For HR administrators in small to medium-sized businesses processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month, manual tracking causes compliance issues. We streamline enrollment and compliance instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR administrators in small to medium-sized businesses using Gusto for employee benefits management
problem_solved: Managing employee benefits enrollment and compliance efficiently
